hero_title: See what coding models actually build.
hero_tagline: Real coding-agent & model benchmarks with live demos — scored by editors and by you
play_hint: These demos are interactive. Click inside a preview to play, or open it in a new tab for the full experience.
benchmarks_description: Compare live artifacts from coding models and agent tools under the same prompt.
leaderboard_description: Compare coding models across editor scores and community ratings.
apps_agents_description: Compare the coding apps and agent harnesses used to produce benchmark results.
name: Name
about_intro: MoobangBench publishes the actual artifacts produced by AI coding models and agent tools, not just pass/fail claims.
methodology_body: Each editor score averages four 10-point criteria: functionality, code quality, polish, and performance. Community scores are anonymous visitor ratings from 1 to 10.
